question: Based on the chart of website visitors over a recent two‑week period, which statement about total visitors over time is most accurate?

options.A: Total visitors were higher in the earlier part of the period than in the later part.
options.B: Total visitors were higher in the later part of the period than in the earlier part.
options.C: Total visitors were roughly the same between the earlier and later parts of the period.
options.D: Total visitors fluctuated so much that no comparison between earlier and later parts is possible.

explanation: The x‑axis order has been scrambled: the bars are not shown in true chronological sequence. If you reorder the days from Day 1 to Day 14 and sum the first and last 7 days, you see that the first segment actually has the greater total. Judging only from the apparent left‑to‑right pattern would give the wrong conclusion.
